content:
type: STATUS
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: Done: added get_image_mimetype() method on ImageBlock (checks cached image_mimetype, else filetype.guess, caches result); image_to_base64 validator now calls it instead of inline guess logic. Tests pass. Not using normalize_image_bytes since my copy doesn't show it yet, but change is additive/isolated to ImageBlock method body so should merge fine.
